home.subtitle: The platform for students and teachers to follow their Japanese learning journey, class by class.
home.studentInviteNote: Students can only join the platform via an invitation from their teacher.

auth.passwordHint: Min. 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, one special character

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials.
login.studentInviteNote: Students receive an email invitation from their teacher.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up to start your learning journey.
register.successText: We sent you a verification email. Open the link in the message to activate your account, then you can log in.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email: we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.successText: If the email address you entered is registered, you will shortly receive instructions to reset your password.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new secure password.
reset.missingToken: Invalid link: the reset token is missing. Request a new link from the 'Forgot password' page.
reset.successText: Your password has been reset successfully. Please log in again with your new credentials.

verifyEmail.successText: Your account is now active. You can log in.
verifyEmail.failNoToken: The link does not contain a valid token.
verifyEmail.failGeneric: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Try registering again or contact support.

verifyEmailChange.successText: Your new email address has been confirmed successfully. You can use it to log in from now on.
verifyEmailChange.invalidText: The link does not contain any security token. Go back to your profile and request a new email change.
verifyEmailChange.failExpired: The confirmation link has expired. Go back to your profile and request a new email change.
verifyEmailChange.failEmailTaken: This email address is now associated with another account.
verifyEmailChange.failGeneric: The token is invalid or has already been used. Request a new email change from your profile.

google.error: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use your email and password.

resend.done: If the address is registered and not yet verified, you'll receive a new verification email shortly.

invite.noTokenText: To register you need a valid invitation link. Students receive their invitation from their teacher.
invite.successText: Your account has been created. You can now sign in.
invite.studentSubtitle: Enter your details to activate your student account.
invite.teacherSubtitle: Enter your details to activate your teacher account.

teacherRequest.title: Teacher application
teacherRequest.subtitle: Submit your application: an administrator will review it before enabling access.
teacherRequest.motivazioneHint: Add a short introduction for the administrator.
teacherRequest.successText: Your application is pending approval. You will receive an email once an administrator has reviewed it.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is an overview of your account on the platform.
dashboard.teacherCardText: View the list of students, change roles and manage the accounts registered on the platform.
dashboard.quizCardText: Practise hiragana and katakana with a spaced-repetition quiz: the characters you miss come back more often. Earn XP, levels and streaks.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information and preferences.
profile.languageDescription: Determines the interface language and the one used in the automated emails sent by the platform.
profile.changeEmailDescription: You will receive a confirmation email at the new address. The change will only take effect after you click the confirmation link.
profile.changeEmailSuccess: Confirmation email sent to <0>{{email}}</0>. Check your new inbox.
profile.deleteDescription: This action is permanent. All your data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
profile.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure? This operation cannot be undone.

users.managementSubtitle: View, filter and manage the accounts registered on the platform.

filters.searchLabel: Search by first or last name

table.emptyFilteredDescription: Try changing or resetting the search filters.
table.emptyAllDescription: When students register, they will appear here.

row.confirmDescription: The account of {{name}} ({{email}}) will be permanently deleted. This operation cannot be undone.

status.notFoundText: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
status.forbiddenText: You do not have the necessary permissions to view this page.

lockout.title: Account temporarily locked due to too many attempts.

errors.network: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.loadFailed: Could not load the data. Please try again.

codes.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email has not been verified yet. Check your inbox for the confirmation link.
codes.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account temporarily locked due to too many attempts. Please try again later.
codes.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
codes.INVALID_TOKEN: Invalid session. Please log in again.
codes.NO_REFRESH_TOKEN: Session expired. Please log in again.
codes.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please log in again.
codes.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Invalid session. Please log in again.
codes.FORBIDDEN: You do not have the necessary permissions for this operation.
codes.CSRF_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid session. Reload the page and try again.
codes.DUPLICATE_VALUE: This email address is already registered. Please choose another one.
codes.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
codes.TOO_MANY_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS: Too many login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
codes.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already associated with another account.
codes.EXPIRED_TOKEN: The token has expired. Please request a new operation.
codes.LAST_TEACHER: Cannot delete or demote the last teacher.
codes.SELF_ROLE_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN: You cannot change your own role.
codes.SELF_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You cannot delete your account from this section. Use the profile settings.
codes.USE_GOOGLE_LOGIN: This account uses Google sign-in. Use the “Continue with Google” button.
codes.GOOGLE_NO_EMAIL: The Google profile doesn't expose an email: sign-in cannot be completed.
codes.ACCOUNT_PENDING: Your account is pending approval by an administrator.
codes.ACCOUNT_NOT_ACTIVE: This account is not allowed to sign in. Please contact an administrator.
codes.GOOGLE_NO_ACCOUNT: No account is associated with this Google address. Access is reserved for invited users.
codes.INVITE_EXPIRED: Invitation expired. Please request a new one.
codes.INVITE_ALREADY_USED: This invitation has already been used.
codes.INVITE_ROLE_MISMATCH: This invitation is not valid for this type of registration.
codes.INVITE_NOT_PENDING: Only pending invitations can be revoked.
codes.EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: An account is already registered with this email.
codes.ADMIN_ROLE_FORBIDDEN: This operation is reserved for administrators.
codes.LAST_ADMIN: You cannot delete or demote the last administrator.

validation.nomeLength: First name must be between 2 and 100 characters
validation.cognomeLength: Last name must be between 2 and 100 characters
validation.etaInt: Age must be an integer between 14 and 99
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number and one special character

invites.managementSubtitle: Invite new students and keep track of the invitations you have sent.

create.studentText: Enter the student's email and assign a class: they will receive a link to complete registration.
create.teacherText: Enter the teacher's email: they will receive a link to complete registration, with no approval needed.

list.title: Sent invitations
list.confirmDescription: The link sent to {{email}} will no longer be usable.
list.emptyDescription: The invitations you send will appear here.

quiz.pageSubtitle: Recognise hiragana and katakana and type their romanisation. Your progress is saved: the trickiest characters will come back more often.

stats.toReviewEmpty: No weak characters right now. Great job!

setup.title: Set up the session
setup.subtitle: Choose what to practise. Up to 20 characters will be drawn.
setup.rowsAllHint: No row selected: all rows will be included.
setup.rowsSomeHint: Only the selected rows will be included.
setup.includeDakuon: Include dakuon and handakuon (が, ぱ…)
setup.timerModeHint: You have a few seconds per character, but earn more XP.

results.title: Session complete
results.levelUp: You went from level {{from}} to level {{to}}!

audio.noVoice: No Japanese voice available on this device
audio.unsupported: Speech synthesis is not supported by your browser

writing.title: On-screen writing
writing.hint: Draw the character with your finger or mouse, following the stroke order.
writing.retryStroke: Stroke not recognized: try again following the guide.

requests.title: Teacher applications
requests.subtitle: Approve or reject teacher access requests.
requests.confirmRejectDescription: {{name}}'s application will be rejected and access will remain denied.
requests.emptyDescription: There are no teacher applications for the selected filter.
